corpus.source: CMU Graphics Lab Motion Capture Database (public domain)

head: d6c8e110d7f4ed032bdd344302da4bcc7ea1656e
key_finding: Conditioner IS genuine (ablation passes, model uses target geometry). But absolute reach calibration is 260-400mm off the 650mm plane. An MLP predicting from frame-0+condition cannot learn precise distance calibration from 62 high-variance training segments.
objective: UNIT-2 v2: genuine trained GRAB conditioner on REAL CMU combat mocap. <=15mm at GRAB_REACH_MM=650.
smallest_next_falsifiable_experiment: Replace the MLP conditioner with a sequence model (transformer or temporal CNN) that predicts per-frame pose corrections conditioned on BOTH the exogenous target AND the current trajectory state. The MLP can only learn static mappings; a sequence model can learn the forward-reach DYNAMICS needed to terminate at a specific distance. Alternatively, augment the corpus with synthesized distance-calibrated grab teachers by scaling the CMU root trajectory so the hand terminates exactly at [620,680]mm.
